summary.lv: IKT projektu vadītājs/-a Magnetiq Bank, vadot bankas informācijas sistēmu un tehnoloģisko projektu dzīves ciklu, tostarp bankas pamatsistēmu un CRM risinājumus.
summary.en: ICT Project Manager at Magnetiq Bank, leading the full lifecycle of banking IS and technology projects including core banking systems and CRM solutions. Requires 3+ years of ICT PM experience.
